violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Food manager's certification expired earlier this month. Facility must have a certified food manager.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee observed putting on gloves without washing her hands first. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee touching her clothes with gloved hands and did not change them before continuing food preparations. Gloves should be changed after touching items not involved in food preparation.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Hand sink hot water found at 132F in the kitchen. Hot water should not exceed 120F.
